expectations.text: References at least one script by filename
expectations.evidence: References both 'init_module.py' (line 18: 'python3 scripts/init_module.py vpc --path ./modules') and 'validate_module.py' (line 735: 'python3 scripts/validate_module.py modules/vpc')

Multiple runnable commands including 'python3 scripts/init_module.py vpc --path ./modules', 'python3 scripts/validate_module.py modules/vpc', 'terraform init', 'terraform fmt -recursive', 'terraform validate', 'terraform plan -out=tfplan', 'terraform apply tfplan', and 'terraform-docs markdown modules/vpc > modules/vpc/README.md'

expectations.text: Links to a relevant reference file
expectations.evidence: Explicitly references 'references/cost_optimization.md' in Step 6 (line 750: "Following the skill's cost optimization reference (references/cost_optimization.md)")

Opens with the skill's decision tree ('Is this reusable across environments/projects? Yes'), then follows structured workflow: Scaffold -> Implement -> Environment Configs -> CIDR Allocation -> Validate -> Cost Optimization -> Deploy -> Next Steps
